transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: First National Bank, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I need to ask about a card I ordered. It should have arrived by now and I'm starting to worry.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Can I get your name please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: One moment... okay, I can see an order. It was sent — sorry, my system is very slow today.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: That's okay. Can you tell me when it was dispatched?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It does show dispatched, yes. I'm going to have to put you on a brief hold.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for holding. I'm going to have to transfer you to our card services team, they'll be able to give you more detail.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Wait — before you transfer me, can you at least confirm the address on file is correct?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The card services team will go through all of that with you. Transferring you now, have a good day.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before accessing account details
transferred call without addressing or resolving the customer's question
did not confirm dispatch address before transfer despite direct request
call ended without resolution or clear next steps
